channel.title: File-Sharing on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in File-Sharing on Arrans github.io

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: localsend/localsend
item.description: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop

item.title: sismics/docs
item.description: Lightweight document management system packed with all the features you can expect from big expensive solutions

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: zelon88/HRConvert2
item.description: A self-hosted, drag-and-drop & nosql file conversion server & share tool that supports 445 file formats in 13 languages.

item.title: openziti/zrok
item.description: Geo-scale, next-generation peer-to-peer sharing platform built on top of OpenZiti.
